# CyberAI

> Sovereign AI cybersecurity platform delivering predictive threat intelligence, conversational defense, and autonomous remediation for high-stakes infrastructure and orbital assets.

CyberAI is a next-generation AI + cybersecurity ecosystem built for governments, defense, and critical infrastructure operators. It combines a command-center bento interface with an AI assistant, real-time telemetry, and autonomous response.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview, command center, capabilities, and AI assistant teaser.
